intent.primary_intent: find a single evening outfit that feels fresh but still true to my wardrobe

recommendations.label: Evening charcoal with deep olive and soft texture
recommendations.logic_summary: This is the sharpest option for a night out because it keeps the color palette familiar while changing texture and proportion: a charcoal knit, deep olive overshirt, and charcoal trousers gives a new reading without moving into jacket territory.

pieces.styling_note: wear open to reveal texture and keep the line clean
keep open for evening and avoid jacket stiffness
keeps the outfit monochrome enough for evening while still feeling grounded
maintain the low-key polished work-to-evening transition
match leather for cohesion and avoid anything shiny

analysis.why_this_works_now: The user asked for something different, and the strongest response is to shift texture, proportion, and layering rather than color. That gives novelty while staying recognizable. The charcoal-dominant outfit keeps the same low-key logic but feels less repeatable because of the overshirt shape, knit texture, and deeper olive tone.
analysis.persona_alignment: The recommendation stays within his practical, understated, textured, and weather-aware wardrobe logic. It avoids anything loud, corporate, or purely fashion-forward, and it keeps the same relaxed straight line with mobility and clean layering that he uses all day.
analysis.profile_alignment: It matches his size preferences and movement needs: relaxed straight trousers, open knit layer, hip-length overshirt, and sturdy boots. The outfit reads polished without effort and can survive museum work, train travel, and then move into evening socializing.
analysis.prompt_alignment: The response follows the strict style output rules, stays in the user's world, and uses the last conversation cue to stay sharp rather than repeat the same charcoal shirt-and-trousers formula.

scene.setting: intimate rooftop bar overlooking a softly lit city skyline, polished concrete, subtle bar details, modern urban ambience
scene.lighting: soft warm ambient bar lighting with gentle cool city glow, natural diffused evening light, flattering low-contrast portrait lighting

pieces.description: charcoal fine-gauge knit top, open-front, matte textured fabric, clean vertical line, relaxed enough to keep the look grounded
deep olive overshirt in matte brushed cotton twill, open-front, soft drape, relaxed but not baggy outer layer
charcoal slim-fit trousers in matte brushed cotton twill, clean straight leg, polished enough for evening
dark brown low-profile leather Chelsea-style boots, matte finish, minimal detailing
dark brown matte leather belt, understated finish

prompt.system: Create a photorealistic virtual try-on image optimized for Gemini Flash. Focus on scene realism, accurate garment drape, natural body proportions, and believable lighting. Keep the image retailer-agnostic. Use subtle photographic realism rather than stylized illustration. Preserve the outfit's true-to-life texture, color, and layering logic. Render the person in a real late-evening urban scene with believable environmental context and lighting. Avoid product marketing language, avoid exaggerated editorial styling, and keep the result useful for a real shopper.
prompt.user: I asked for a single evening outfit that feels fresh but still true to my wardrobe. Use the recommended look: a charcoal fine-gauge knit, deep olive matte overshirt, charcoal slim trousers, dark brown low-profile leather boots, and a dark brown matte leather belt. Render this as a photorealistic virtual try-on for a late-evening social event on a rooftop bar overlooking a softly lit city skyline. Emphasize the fresh-but-familiar palette, the new reading from texture and proportion, and the easy work-to-evening polish. Keep the silhouette refined but grounded, the overshirt open, the knit open, and the trousers clean. Use soft warm bar lighting with gentle cool city glow, realistic matte textures, natural body proportions, and believable garment drape. The image should feel like a real evening photo, not a fashion illustration, and should communicate that this outfit works for me in a relaxed but still appropriate urban nightlife setting.
